<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Geospatial; class FromMember implements FromInterface { private const KEYWORD = 'FROMMEMBER'; /** * @var string */ private $member; public function __construct(string $member) { $this->member = $member; } /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function toArray(): array { return [self::KEYWORD, $this->member]; } }
